name: Mobile — demo page chat widget opens and fits the screen at 390px

planSteps.description: Set the browser viewport to a mobile size of 390 x 844 (iPhone-class portrait)
The demo page main heading is visible and content fits the mobile width with no horizontal scroll
Tap the floating circular chat launcher button in the bottom-right corner (aria-label 'Open chat')
The chat panel opens showing the assistant name 'ChatDock Assistant', and the panel fits within the 390px-wide viewport (its right and left edges are inside the screen, not clipped off-screen)
The message input (placeholder 'Type a message…') and its send button are both visible and reachable within the mobile viewport
